rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.159 governs campaign finance dissolution reports. The two provisions are unrelated and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 254.159. DISSOLUTION REPORT. If a general-purpose committee expects no reportable activity to occur after the period covered by a report filed under this subchapter, the report may be designated as a "dissolution" report as provided by Section 254.126 for a specific-purpose committee and has the same effect.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption change and election code dissolution report provision.
